title: Enzo's Trailer Fixes
description: Fixes Multiple Textures Inside The Trailers Vision Texture Pack To Be More Like The Trailers.
body:
**Enzo's Trailer Fixes**
- 
Enzo's Trailer Fixes Is a Resource Pack Made To Patch Textures, Inside The **Trailers Vision** Texture Pack To Be Even More Like The Trailers, It Is **Unknown If This Is Compatible With Bare Bones.**


**This Resource Pack Contains Modified Assets From Trailer's Vision, By DiamondIsntHere Licensed Under [CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) It Is Recommended For You To Download This Texture Pack With Trailers Vision, For The Best Experience.**

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Made Some Item's Emissive Such As: Amethyst Shard, Glow Berries (Required Trailers Vision For The Glow Berries To Be Emissive.)
- Reworked textures For Trailer's Vision Such As: Bread, Brush, Carrot, Cookie, Emerald, Gold    Ingot, Lava Bucket, Ominous Bottle, Potato, Poisonous Potato, Trial Key, Ward Armor Trim
</details>


[![trailervisionbadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9146a7e47620baa4d67913d4c4d773a19326d45a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trailers-vision)
